character: The wrath of the wild and the mind of a man - with the ruthlessness of both. I have weathered more than most could fathom, and I will have my vengeance.
Druid1.flavour_text: There are many paths to achieve your goals... and you see them all.
Druid1.name: Oracle

character: The wrath of the wild and the mind of a man - with the ruthlessness of both. I have weathered more than most could fathom, and I will have my vengeance.

character: Life is all about making an impact. Leaving a mark. Simply surviving is not good enough. If you're not doing it with style, why fight at all? Put a sword in my hand. I'll give you a show you won't soon forget.
Trait: Fast attack with offhand weapons
Duelist1.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Giller

character: The Spirit bid me leave my mountain, only to find violence and death. Give me a spear! If they want blood, I will show them what it means to fight for survival.
Trait: Trained to block incoming attacks

Huntress1.name: Amazon

character: Hear me, Ancestors! A warrior stands before you, a man who chooses his own Way. I fight without fear, and should I die, know that my war will continue in the Halls of the Dead. Neither monster nor man shall stand in my way.

character: You've got a weapon, I'll wield it. Just tell me where to point it. I've seen the highs and horrors of war, and I'll do whatever it takes to survive. If you've got coin, I'm your man.
Mercenary1.flavour_text: Countless wars have left you with skills somewhat resembling a decent officer...
Mercenary1.name: Tactician

character: You've got a weapon, I'll wield it. Just tell me where to point it. I've seen the highs and horrors of war, and I'll do whatever it takes to survive. If you've got coin, I'm your man.

character: You've got a weapon, I'll wield it. Just tell me where to point it. I've seen the highs and horrors of war, and I'll do whatever it takes to survive. If you've got coin, I'm your man.

character: My life has been naught but discipline and focus, preparing me for this. I fight for the Benevolent Dreamer. Free my hands, and those who seek chaos will fall before me!
Trait: Trained to evade incoming attacks

character: My life has been naught but discipline and focus, preparing me for this. I fight for the Benevolent Dreamer. Free my hands, and those who seek chaos will fall before me!

character: All I need is a single well-placed arrow. I'm fleet of foot, and have the eyes of a hawk. Put a bow in my hands, and they'll die trying to catch me.
Trait: Arrows fly fast and true
Ranger1.flavour_text: A woman can change the world with a single well-placed arrow.
Ranger1.name: Deadeye

character:
You were born with quickness of body and sharpness of mind. How have you paid for these gifts? With innocent blood.
 
Yours is a predatory profession. The business of butchery. You have stolen many a life to fill your purse.
 
Now you will earn your redemption in Wraeclast.
Trait: Poison remain potent for longer
Shadow1.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Ice Fisher

character: The elements are mine to control. I know why lightning strikes, why fire burns, and why cold freezes. They do so because I command it. The vengeance of the Maraketh will find those who have transgressed no matter where they run.
Sorceress1.flavour_text: The rumble of thunder heralds your approach. Woe to those that draw your ire.
Sorceress1.name: Stormweaver

character: The elements are mine to control. I know why lightning strikes, why fire burns, and why cold freezes. They do so because I command it. The vengeance of the Maraketh will find those who have transgressed no matter where they run.
Sorceress2.flavour_text: The tapestry of time is yours to weave; an element you alone may master.

character: The elements are mine to control. I know why lightning strikes, why fire burns, and why cold freezes. They do so because I command it. The vengeance of the Maraketh will find those who have transgressed no matter where they run.
Sorceress3.flavour_text: By your command, they will earn redemption...one duty at a time.
Sorceress3.name: Disciple of Varashta

character: Do not mistake me for humble and weak because I am a man of God. No. We Templars have learned we must handle earthly affairs on our own. Though God is absent, evil shall not go unpunished.
Trait: His Spirit is stronger than most
Templar1.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Seaman

character: I wanted very little for myself. A forge, a bed. They took that all away when they burned down my home. Give me one good hammer, and they will find that there is nothing more dangerous than a man of peace roused to war.
Warrior1.flavour_text: Incredible might has always laid buried within you. Now is the time to rise.
Warrior1.name: Titan

character: I wanted very little for myself. A forge, a bed. They took that all away when they burned down my home. Give me one good hammer, and they will find that there is nothing more dangerous than a man of peace roused to war.
Warrior2.flavour_text: Your home has been threatened. A good man must be roused to war.
Warrior2.name: Warbringer

character: I wanted very little for myself. A forge, a bed. They took that all away when they burned down my home. Give me one good hammer, and they will find that there is nothing more dangerous than a man of peace roused to war.
Warrior3.flavour_text: You hunger for power, and by force of arms, you will take it.
Warrior3.name: Smith of Kitava

character: I do not fear death. I am its master. Darkness and the dead are my weapons of war. My enemies will rot from the inside out, as my army of corpses tears them screaming limb from limb.
Witch1.flavour_text: You seek power at any cost... and there is no price too high to pay.
Witch1.name: Infernalist

character: I do not fear death. I am its master. Darkness and the dead are my weapons of war. My enemies will rot from the inside out, as my army of corpses tears them screaming limb from limb.
Witch2.flavour_text: Your search for power took you on a journey inwards.

to_passive.name: Rupture the Flesh
stat_text: [Curse|Cursed] Enemies Killed by you, or by [Allies] in your [Presence], have a 33% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as [Physical] Damage

to_passive.name: Umbral Well
stat_text: Skeletal [Minion|Minions] you would create instead grant you [LichSkeletalBuff|Umbral Souls] for each [Minion] you would have created

to_passive.name: Unwilling Offering
stat_text: Your [Offering|Offerings] can target Enemies in [CullingStrike|Culling] range
Your [Offering|Offerings] affect you instead of your [Minion|Minions]
[Offering|Offerings] created by [CullingStrike|Culling] Enemies have 1% increased [BuffEffect|Effect] per [Power] of [CullingStrike|Culled] Enemy

to_passive.name: Steward of Kulemak
stat_text: Damaging [Spell|Spells] consume a [Charges|Power Charge] if able to trigger Abyssal Apparition

to_passive.name: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge
stat_text: 30% increased maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] if you've consumed a [Charges|Power Charge] [Recently|Recently]
